content: I will remove the top border of the sub-tabs container and replace the IIFE with direct JSX mapping to enable smooth moving transition animations of the underline using Framer Motion.

args.Description: "Remove top border and IIFE function from sub-tabs container in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.Instruction: "Remove border-t border-slate-100 and evaluate activeJobsCount, pausedJobsCount, closedJobsCount directly in JSX mapping to allow transition animations to run in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.toolAction: "Removing header divider and IIFE in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
